g.text: WHAT THE BIBLE ACTUALLY SAYS ABOUT THE AFTERLIFE
popular: dying souls float up to heaven · biblical: God comes down, dead are raised, earth renewed
heaven verses fall into 3 categories — none describe
they wait. they are not finished.
"ready to be revealed in the last time"
DELIVERED TO US AT THE END
things that come from heaven to earth
Christ comes back to us, not us to Him
"Heaven is the waiting room. It is not the address."
heaven comes down — God dwells with us — bodies are raised
"coming down out of heaven from God" — Rev 21:2
EARTH RENEWED — God dwells with humanity (Rev 21:3)
building, planting, feasting, reigning · resurrection bodies in a resurrection world · Rev 5:10 "they shall reign on the earth"
citizens go OUT to meet the king...
...and ESCORT HIM BACK to the city
Job 19:26 — "in my flesh I shall see God"
Dan 12:2 — "those who sleep in dust shall awake"
Ezek 37 — bones, sinew, flesh; placed in land
Jesus didn't say "I am the ticket to heaven"
Rom 8:23 — redemption OF bodies, not FROM
2. essence vs. energies — iron in fire (2 Pet 1:4)
Rom 8:21 — creation set free, not destroyed
2 Pet 3:13 — new earth where righteousness dwells
Rev 22:1-2 — river · tree of life · Eden++
Zech 14:4 — His feet on the Mt. of Olives
four words → four meanings · three orthodox views
existence apart from God · C.S. Lewis
RICH MAN & LAZARUS · GEHENNA · LAKE OF FIRE
parable using stock Jewish imagery · Jesus' point: listen to Moses & Prophets now (Luke 16:31)
"Sodom & Gomorrah" (Jude 7) — fire's result is eternal · Sodom isn't still burning
Source: handouts/heaven-hell-resurrection.md · systematictheology · all Scripture refs ESV unless noted
Not escape from creation. Its redemption.
